---
title: "Andy's introduction"
toc: false
about:
  template: marquee
  image: my_picture.png
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Jakey-vn
    - icon: linkedin
      text: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/andy-tran-167223303/
    - icon: facebook
      text: facebook
      href: https://www.facebook.com/huy.tran.870537/
---

## Hi, I'm Andy

I hold a **Bachelor of Economics** from Monash University and am completing my **Master of Business Analytics**, due to graduate in **July 2026**. Upon graduation I will be applying for a **Subclass 485 Graduate Visa**, so there are no work eligibility concerns. Therefore, I am fully available for full-time employment in Australia from July onwards.

My interest in analytics took off after diving into **machine learning** and **forecasting** during my undergraduate years, and I have since built that into real industry experience across data integration, reporting automation, and interactive dashboards. I am comfortable taking ambiguous problems end-to-end and communicating results clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

### Core skills
- **Analytics:** exploratory analysis, visualisation, forecasting, basic ML (classification/regression), experiment design
- **Data work:** wrangling, feature engineering, data quality checks, reproducible reporting (Quarto), dashboard development (Shiny)
- **Business:** requirements gathering, stakeholder communication, presenting insights

### Toolbox
- **R** (tidyverse, ggplot2, Quarto, Shiny), **Excel** (advanced formulas/Power Query)
- **SQL**, **Qlik**, **Python** (pandas), **EViews**
- Git/GitHub, Microsoft Office

### Open to Graduate Programs & Full-Time Roles
I am actively seeking **graduate programs and full-time positions** in data analytics or business intelligence. I will be completing my **Master of Business Analytics at Monash University in July 2026** and am ready to bring hands-on industry experience in R, Shiny, SQL, and reporting automation to a full-time team.
